summary: Knowledge Lab feature testing complete. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI tests passed. Fixed a bug in the API client where uploadKnowledgeDocument and analyzeKnowledgeDocument methods used undefined 'this.baseUrl' instead of 'API_URL'.

minor.issue: Returns 'AI is not enabled' when AI is disabled - expected behavior but should be documented

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/frontend/src/api/client.js - uploadKnowledgeDocument and analyzeKnowledgeDocument methods were using undefined 'this.baseUrl' instead of 'API_URL'
Document analysis for images/videos is MOCKED - returns placeholder text instead of actual vision model analysis
Deployment docs (DEPLOYMENT.md) and deploy.sh script are ready but cannot be tested in preview environment
seed_data_creation: Created test documents during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Knowledge Lab feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/knowledge/upload, /api/knowledge/documents, /api/knowledge/documents/{id}, /api/knowledge/analyze/{id}, /api/knowledge/stats all working. Frontend UI shows Knowledge Lab tab in AI Co-Pilot page with stats, upload button, supported formats display, and document grid. Document analysis requires AI to be enabled in settings.

features_tested.Knowledge Lab Tab: PASS - Appears in AI Co-Pilot page when AI is enabled
features_tested.Document Upload API: PASS - Supports PDF, TXT, CSV, DOCX, XLSX, MD, PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, HEIC, MP4, MOV, WEBM, AVI
features_tested.Document List API: PASS - Returns all documents with filtering by file_type and tag
features_tested.Document Get API: PASS - Returns single document by ID
features_tested.Document Delete API: PASS - Deletes document and file from disk
features_tested.Stats API: PASS - Returns counts by file type (document/image/video)
features_tested.Duplicate Detection: PASS - Rejects files with same hash
features_tested.Unsupported Format Rejection: PASS - Rejects .exe and other unsupported formats
features_tested.UI Upload: PASS - File upload via UI works correctly
features_tested.UI Delete: PASS - Document delete via UI works correctly
features_tested.UI Stats Display: PASS - Shows Total Documents, Documents, Images, Videos counts
features_tested.UI Supported Formats: PASS - Displays all supported formats correctly
features_tested.UI Document Selection: PASS - Shows analyze section when document selected

mocked_apis.Document Analysis for Images/Videos: Returns placeholder text - would require vision model in production

deployment_docs.deploy.sh: Ready - Microservices deployment script with up/down/restart/status/logs/cleanup commands
deployment_docs.DEPLOYMENT.md: Ready - Comprehensive deployment guide with architecture diagram, API routing, monitoring, troubleshooting
